request_replay: Replaying identical encoded mutation bytes with the same request_id returns the original canonical result without applying the mutation again; reusing the request_id with a different payload fails.
save_playlist: Success returns playlist_saved with the exact canonical stored playlist and allocated slug. A create replay returns that same slug and never allocates a second playlist.
playlist_broadcast: After playlist_saved, playlists may broadcast the new global collection without request correlation. The broadcast is not the create acknowledgement.
scan_correlation: A client-requested scan echoes request_id on every scan event. An unsolicited daemon scan omits request_id and is correlated only by session_id.
